PART 1 I CUSTOM IZA I ION OP1IONS

data.description: Your size is larger than normal.

When use healer's kit stabilize dying creature, creature regains 1 hit point. As action. you can spend one use of healer's kit to tend to creature restore +4 points and 1d6 hit points to a creature, plus the additional points to creature's Hit Points. The creature can't regain hit points from this feat until finishes short or long rest.

Prerequisite: Proliciency with mediuJ1Jarmor
Vou trained Illaster use heavy
to
have
the of armor,
benefits:
Increase Strength by a
your
score 1, to rnaximum 20.
You proficiency heavy with armor.

Prerequisite: Proficiency with heavy armor. Vou use armor deflect that kill can your to strikes would gain following benefits: While are you wearing heavy armor, the bludgeoning, piercing, slashing damage that you take from non-magical weapons is reduced by 3.
Increase Intelligence by a maximum of 2, Vou learn three languages of your choice.

Whenever you make an attack roll, ability check, or saving throw, you can spend one point of luck to roll a additional d20. You choose which of the d20s is used after the outcome is determined. Vou also can spend one point of luck when a attack die is rolled against you.
